name: Fruit Basket Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Merrill
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease baking sheets. Combine cherries, dates, apricots, and raisins in a small bowl. Transfer half of the mixture to a food processor. Add 1 tablespoon flour and chop finely using on/off pulses. Turn into a bowl; repeat with the remaining mixture. Cream butter and sugar in a large bowl. Beat in egg. Stir in orange juice and lemon extract. Sift baking soda, cream of tartar, salt, and remaining flour over egg mixture; blend well. Stir in chopped nuts and fruit. Chill dough slightly.
Shape into 1-inch balls. Transfer to prepared baking sheets and press gently with a fork to flatten. Bake until golden, about 18-20 minutes. Cool on wire racks. Store in airtight containers.
